examples: You must be referring to the term fan service and my gawd, there's plenty of it.
The salesperson then translates that suggestion into "OH-MY-GAWD-WE-HAVE-TO-HAVE-THIS-NOW!!!
Thank gawd... the last thing we want to see is someone screaming into a 7-inch tablet held to the side of their head.
Gawd, I wish it had a big V-8 under the hood.
